+            prev_sign <= sign;

examples.before_code:
`timescale 1ns/1ps

import alu_common::*;

module alu_ctrl (
    input logic clk,
    input logic rst,
    input logic enter,
    input logic sign,
    output alu_op_t fn,
    output logic [1:0] reg_ctrl
    );

    alu_op_t current_state, next_state;

    always_ff @(posedge clk or posedge rst) begin 
        if (rst) begin
            current_state <= INPUT_A;
        end else begin
            current_state <= next_state;
        end
    end

    always_comb begin : comb
        next_state = current_state;
        reg_ctrl = 2'b00;

        case (current_state)
            INPUT_A: begin
                reg_ctrl = 2'b01;
                if (enter) begin
                    next_state = INPUT_B;
                end 
            end
            INPUT_B: begin
                reg_ctrl = 2'b10;
                if (enter) begin
                    next_state = U_ADD;
                end 
            end
            U_ADD: begin
                if (enter) begin
                    next_state = U_SUB;
                end else begin
                    if (sign) begin
                        next_state = S_ADD;
                    end else begin
                        next_state = U_ADD;
                    end
                end
            end
            U_SUB: begin
                if (enter) begin
                    next_state = U_MOD3;
                end else begin
                    if (sign) begin
                        next_state = S_SUB;
                    end else begin
                        next_state = U_SUB;
                    end
                end

            end
            U_MOD3: begin
                if (enter) begin
                    next_state = U_ADD;
                end else begin
                    if (sign) begin
                        next_state = S_MOD3;
                    end else begin
                        next_state = U_MOD3;
                    end
                end
            end
            S_ADD: begin
                if (enter) begin
                    next_state = S_SUB;
                end else begin
                    if (sign) begin
                        next_state = U_ADD;
                    end else begin
                        next_state = S_ADD;
                    end
                end
            end
            S_SUB: begin
                if (enter) begin
                    next_state = S_MOD3;
                end else begin
                    if (sign) begin
                        next_state = U_SUB;
                    end else begin
                        next_state = S_SUB;
                    end
                end

            end
            S_MOD3: begin
                if (enter) begin
                    next_state = S_ADD;
                end else begin
                    if (sign) begin
                        next_state = U_MOD3;
                    end else begin
                        next_state = S_MOD3;
                    end
                end
            end
            default: begin
                
            end 
        endcase
    end

    assign fn = current_state;
    
    

endmodule

-            4'd11: sev_seg_temp = 7'b1000111; // letter F, overflow
-            default: sev_seg_temp = 7'b0000000; // blank/error

+            4'd1: sev_seg_temp = 7'b1001111; // 1
+            4'd2: sev_seg_temp = 7'b0010010; // 2

+            4'd11: sev_seg_temp = 7'b0111000; // letter F
+            default: sev_seg_temp = 7'b1110111; // blank/error
         endcase
     end
examples.before_code:
`timescale 1ns/1ps

module bcd_to_7seg(
    input logic [3:0] bcd_in,
    output logic [6:0] sev_seg
);
    logic [6:0] sev_seg_temp;

    always_comb begin
        case (bcd_in)
            4'd0: sev_seg_temp = 7'b1111110; // 0
            4'd1: sev_seg_temp = 7'b0110000; // 1
            4'd2: sev_seg_temp = 7'b1101101; // 2
            4'd3: sev_seg_temp = 7'b1111001; // 3
            4'd4: sev_seg_temp = 7'b0110011; // 4
            4'd5: sev_seg_temp = 7'b1011011; // 5
            4'd6: sev_seg_temp = 7'b1011111; // 6
            4'd7: sev_seg_temp = 7'b1110000; // 7
            4'd8: sev_seg_temp = 7'b1111111; // 8
            4'd9: sev_seg_temp = 7'b1111011; // 9
            4'd10: sev_seg_temp = 7'b0000001; // minus sign (-)
            4'd11: sev_seg_temp = 7'b1000111; // letter F, overflow
            default: sev_seg_temp = 7'b0000000; // blank/error
        endcase
    end

    assign sev_seg = sev_seg_temp;
endmodule
examples.after_code:
`timescale 1ns/1ps

module bcd_to_7seg(
    input logic [3:0] bcd_in,
    output logic [6:0] sev_seg
);
    logic [6:0] sev_seg_temp;

    always_comb begin
        case (bcd_in)
            4'd0: sev_seg_temp = 7'b0000001; // 0
            4'd1: sev_seg_temp = 7'b1001111; // 1
            4'd2: sev_seg_temp = 7'b0010010; // 2
            4'd3: sev_seg_temp = 7'b0000110; // 3
            4'd4: sev_seg_temp = 7'b1001100; // 4
            4'd5: sev_seg_temp = 7'b0100100; // 5
            4'd6: sev_seg_temp = 7'b0100000; // 6
            4'd7: sev_seg_temp = 7'b0001111; // 7
            4'd8: sev_seg_temp = 7'b0000000; // 8
            4'd9: sev_seg_temp = 7'b0000100; // 9
            4'd10: sev_seg_temp = 7'b1111110; // minus sign (-)
            4'd11: sev_seg_temp = 7'b0111000; // letter F
            default: sev_seg_temp = 7'b1110111; // blank/error
        endcase
    end

    assign sev_seg = sev_seg_temp;
endmodule
